summary: This document outlines the NICE Evidence Standards Framework (ESF) for Digital Health Technologies, detailing three tiers (A, B, C) and specific classifications based on intended use. It includes instructional text on how to navigate the spreadsheet and a table of example technologies from various developers like Edwards Lifesciences and Abbott. The content serves as a reference for classifying digital health tools within the UK healthcare system.
